title: oberna antelopum
side_effects: Oberna antelopum can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, which may cause skin irritation, itching, and difficulty breathing. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to digestive issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. It may also cause cardiovascular problems, including increased heart rate and blood pressure, in individuals with pre-existing conditions. If not used under the guidance of a medical professional, Oberna antelopum can exacerbate certain health conditions, such as anxiety and depression.
